channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: hasaneyldrm /exercises-dataset | HTML | N/A
item.description: 1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.

item.title: coreyhaines31 /marketingskills | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

item.title: Shubhamsaboo /awesome-llm-apps | Python | N/A
item.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

item.title: HenryNdubuaku /maths-cs-ai-compendium | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Become a cracked AI/ML Research Engineer

item.title: openinterpreter /openinterpreter | Rust | N/A
item.description: A coding agent for low-cost models

item.title: Dicklesworthstone /destructive_command_guard | Rust | N/A
item.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

item.title: moeru-ai /airi | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

item.title: mattpocock /skills | Shell | N/A
item.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

item.title: Nutlope /hallmark | CSS | N/A
item.description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
